mapper.sql: id, user_id, novel_id, last_read_chapter_id, last_read_time, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM bookshelf WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bookshelf WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND novel_id = #{novelId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bookshelf SET last_read_chapter_id = #{chapterId}, last_read_time = NOW(), updated_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND novel_id = #{novelId}
